goal: App Store submission prep (batch 1): lock portrait orientation + add iOS privacy manifest
done: Info.plist UISupportedInterfaceOrientations reduced to Portrait only (was Portrait+LandscapeLeft+LandscapeRight); added ios/App/App/PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy (NSPrivacyTracking false, UserDefaults required-reason CA92.1, collected-data types for GA4 analytics + auth email/name).
notes: PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy still needs to be added to the App target's Copy Bundle Resources in Xcode to ship in the binary. Part of the full-native-auth iOS launch track.
